main.description: Permanent robot-witnessed audit event for a deployment site. N >= 2 independent robot DID signatures REQUIRED. Class=anomaly/injury subtypes are XChaCha20-Poly1305-enveloped per ADR-2605181100; class=community-event/compliance-check are public (transparency triple per ADR-2605192315 §3). Feeds Phenotype.effectiveMultiplier delta per ADR-2605192230.

planDid.description: Optional — when event is during construction phase

evidenceCid.description: IPFS CID for evidence — encrypted envelope for anomaly/injury, clear CID for community/compliance

participantDids.description: DIDs of all participants in the event (excluding robots which are in witnessAttestations)

phenotypeDeltaTargetDid.description: DID whose Phenotype.effectiveMultiplier is updated as a consequence (e.g., responsible steward on injury; site steward on community-event)

phenotypeDeltaBps.description: Signed basis-points delta to apply (negative = penalty, positive = reward). Magnitude bounded by ADR-2605192230 enforcement schedule.

councilEscalated.description: true when witness-mismatch or other constitutional trigger fires
